title: Dunzo Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Dunzo Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Dunzo Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About Dunzo Capital India:
Dunzo Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Capital India!
